summary: auth from-1password reports profile_synced only when a profile was actually persisted to config; a fetched-but-unsaved profile is reported as profile_fetched instead.
reason: Reporting profile_synced=true whenever --sync-profile fetched a profile (even without --save) misleads agents into assuming a later reserve --use-saved-profile can rely on a saved profile that was never written to disk.
validated_outcome: go test ./internal/cli covers from-1password --sync-profile without --save (profile_synced=false, profile_fetched=true, no config written) and with --save --sync-profile (profile_synced=true, profile persisted).
